PD MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE UNDER PC 1538,5, FILED

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/PD/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL MAKES AN ORAL PC 991 MOTION ASTO COUNTS 1, 2 AND 4/MO DENIED/X:AS TO EACH COUNT,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:07-05-22/SAORD/SA1:ABELINO VASQUEZ-LOPZ/SA2:701 BRAZIL AVE,SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/ACM/DEF:IS TO REPORT TWICE PER WEEK AND ENGAGE IN DRUG COUNSELING AS DETERMINED BY ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & JURY TRIAL/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM REPORT/
